title: TierChanged
description: Wire contract for tier-change events on the member-events exchange (routing key tier.changed). Producer: services/members (transactional outbox, ADR-0024). Consumer: services/notifications. Carries no PII — consumers resolve contact details themselves at send time.

eventId.description: Deterministic dedup key (also the outbox document id). Earn-path changes use tier-{memberId}-{newTier}-{ledgerEntryId}; sweep changes use tier-{memberId}-{newTier}-{yyyyMMdd}.

previousTier.description: Effective tier before the change, uppercase as rendered everywhere else.

correlationId.description: Optional trailing field (ADR-0002 additive convention). Sweep-originated events omit it.
